_comment: Context7 MCP Server — provides up-to-date documentation and code examples for any library.
No API keys required. Queries the Context7 API for library documentation.
Install: Copy the 'context7' key into .mcp.json under mcpServers.

_available: resolve-library-id  — Resolve a library name to a Context7-compatible ID
query-docs           — Query documentation for a specific library by ID

usage_workflow: 1. First call resolve-library-id with the library name (e.g., 'react', 'express')
2. Select the best matching library ID from results
3. Call query-docs with the library ID and your specific question
4. Get up-to-date documentation and code examples
example_queries: How to set up authentication with JWT in Express.js
Next.js app router data fetching patterns
supported_libraries: Most popular npm packages, Python packages, and frameworks
And thousands more — try any library name
